claim.claim-text: A process for preparing a liquid food product comprising: a) a first step comprising obtaining an oat flour by milling peeled oat grain; b) a second step comprising mixing the oat flour with water to obtain mixture B; c) a third step comprising adding at least one glycosidase to mixture B, and heating mixture B at a rate of 1 to 10 °C per minute to a maximum of 80 °C, obtaining a mixture C comprising a liquid portion containing particles in suspension and a precipitating portion; and d) a step comprising lowering the temperature of mixture C or the liquid portion of mixture C, and adding to mixture C or the liquid portion of mixture C a combination of at least a protease, a deamidase and a transglutaminase; wherein step d) is implemented by d1) a fourth step comprising lowering the temperature of mixture C to a maximum of 30 °C and adding to mixture C a combination of at least a protease, a deamidase and a transglutaminase to obtain mixture D; the process further comprising e1) a fifth step comprising incubating mixture D; and f1) a sixth step comprising the separation of the liquid portion and the precipitating portion of mixture D to obtain the liquid food product; or wherein step d) is implemented by e2) a fifth step comprising lowering the temperature of the liquid portion of mixture C to a maximum of 2°C and adding to the liquid portion of mixture C a combination of at least a protease, a deamidase and a transglutaminase to obtain liquid portion D; the process further comprising d2) a fourth step preceding step e2) comprising the separation of the liquid portion and the precipitating portion of mixture C; and f2) a sixth step following step e2) comprising incubating the liquid portion D to obtain the liquid food product.

The process according to claim 1, further comprising a seventh step g1) of submitting the liquid portion to a temperature drop of at least 1°C per minute to reach a temperature of of a maximum 2°C and/or an eighth step h) of microbiological stabilization of the obtained liquid portion.
The process according to claims 1 or 2, wherein in step b) the oat flour is mixed with at least two glycosydases.
The process according to claim 3, wherein the glycosidase is selected from the group consisting of a-amylase and p-glucanase.
The process according to any one of claims 1 to 4, wherein the oat flour is obtained by dry milling of oat grain or by wet milling of peeled oat grain or a combination of both.

The process according to any one of claims 1 to 5, wherein a a glycosydase, preferably an amyloglycosidase, is added together with the combination of at least a protease, a deamidase and a transglutaminase in steps (d1) or (e2).
The process according to any one of claims 1 to 6, wherein the protease is a carboxypeptidase and/or the deamidase is a protein-glutaminase.
The process according to any one of claims 1 to 7, wherein mixture B in step d) is heated up to a temperature comprised between 55 to 80 °C, preferably 70 to 80 °C.

The process according to any one of claims 1 to 8, wherein the concentration of deamidase, protease and transglutaminase in step c) is between 1000-8000 LI/100L of deamidase, between 40-200 LI/100L of protease and between 400-6500 LI/100L of transglutaminase with respect to the total volume of the liquid portion of mixture C.
The process according to any one of claims 1 to 9, wherein the incubation time in steps e1) or f2) is between 60 minutes and 48 hours.

The process according to any one of claims 1 to 10, wherein the temperature in step d1) is lowered to a temperature comprised between 30 and 60 °C, preferably to a temperature comprised between 45 and 55 °C.
The process according to claim 11, wherein the temperature in step d1) is lowered to a temperature comprised between 45 and 55 °C and the incubation time in step f1) is between 80 and 160 minutes.
The process according to any one of claims 1 to 10, wherein the temperature in step e2) is lowered to a temperature between 2 and 8 °C.
Liquid food product obtained by the process according to any one of claims 1 to 13.
A tea- or coffee-based beverage comprising the liquid food product according to claim 14.

A process of preparing the tea- or coffee-based beverage defined in claim 15, comprising mixing tea or coffee at a temperature close to their boiling point with the liquid food product defined in claim 14.

A process of preparing a liquid food product suitable for human consumers using the liquid food product of claim 14, wherein the liquid food product is the final product or a starting material of the process.
The process according to claim 16, wherein the human consumers are celiac or intolerant to gluten and/or intolerant or allergic to dairy products.
